name: critical-gate
description: Repository-aware diff integrity gate for AI-generated code changes.

scripts.package:vscode: node scripts/prepare-vscode-package.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:vscode && pnpm --dir extensions/vscode exec vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --out ../../artifacts/vscode/critical-gate-vscode.vsix
scripts.test:vscode: pnpm build && pnpm build:vscode && pnpm build:vscode-tests && node scripts/run-vscode-tests.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm format && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:vscode && pnpm build:vscode-tests && pnpm test
